info.title: Ilex Inventory API
info.description: Ilex Inventory Server — F&B CPG inventory management.

post.description:
Authenticate an existing user and set session cookie.

CSRF-exempt for the inbound request (no token possible pre-login);
sets the csrftoken cookie on the response so subsequent mutations
have a token to echo back via X-CSRFToken.
post.summary: Log in with email and password

post.description:
Clear the session. Requires an active session (IsAuthenticated).

CSRF token required (default SessionAuthentication behavior).

get.description:
Return the currently authenticated user.

Returns 401 when no session is present (IsAuthenticated default).
Refreshes the csrftoken cookie on every call so a long-lived session
can recover from a missing/stale token by re-bootstrapping.

post.description:
Create a new account and log in immediately.

CSRF-exempt for the inbound request (no token possible pre-signup);
sets the csrftoken cookie on the response so subsequent mutations
have a token to echo back via X-CSRFToken.

get.description: GET /batches — list batches for the authenticated owner.
GET /batches/{id} — return batch with on_hand + recall state.

post.description:
POST /batches/{id}/movements — record an adjustment or write-off.

SPEC §2.6 mandates `Idempotency-Key` for write_off (a stock-debiting
operation that is destructive on retry). Adjustment is a free-form audit
correction and does not require the header. The view dispatches by `kind`:
write_off goes through the `@idempotent`-decorated path, adjustment runs
directly. Pre-ILEX-016, neither was decorated and a retried write_off
could double-debit stock.

get.description: GET /batches/{id}/recall-report — recall report for a batch (JSON or CSV).
get.summary: Recall report for a batch (JSON or CSV export)

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Set to 'csv' to receive a streaming CSV export instead of the default JSON response. The response Content-Type will be text/csv; charset=utf-8 with a Content-Disposition header.

get.description: GET /financials/dashboard — aggregated dashboard or CSV of top_products.
get.summary: Financial dashboard totals (JSON or CSV export)

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Set to 'csv' to receive a streaming CSV export instead of the default JSON response. The response Content-Type will be text/csv; charset=utf-8 with a Content-Disposition header.

get.description: GET /financials/margin — paginated per-product margin rows or CSV export.
get.summary: Per-product margin list (JSON or CSV export)

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Set to 'csv' to receive a streaming CSV export instead of the default JSON response. The response Content-Type will be text/csv; charset=utf-8 with a Content-Disposition header.

get.description:
Liveness probe with Postgres reachability check.

Anonymous — no auth, no CSRF (GET only).
get.summary: Liveness probe with Postgres reachability check

get.description: GET /movements — paginated audit log or CSV streaming export.
get.summary: List stock movements (JSON or CSV export)

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Set to 'csv' to receive a streaming CSV export instead of the default JSON response. The response Content-Type will be text/csv; charset=utf-8 with a Content-Disposition header.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: Filter by product UUID (via batch join)

get.description:
GET /products — list + search + filter.
POST /products — create a new product.

post.description:
GET /products — list + search + filter.
POST /products — create a new product.
POST /products/import — multipart CSV upload with idempotency.

get.description:
GET /purchase-orders — list with filters + pagination.
POST /purchase-orders — create a draft PO.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: draft or received

post.description:
GET /purchase-orders — list with filters + pagination.
POST /purchase-orders — create a draft PO.

get.summary: Get a purchase order by ID

post.summary: Receive a purchase order (requires Idempotency-Key header)

get.description: GET /sales-orders — list sales orders for the authenticated owner.

post.description: POST /sales-orders — create a draft sales order.

get.description: GET /sales-orders/{id} — return SO with lines + allocations.

post.summary: Preview FEFO allocations for a sales order

PatchedProductUpdateRequestRequest.description:
PATCH /products/{id} — only name and description are patchable.

Any other key (including `sku`) is rejected: DRF strict-mode via
validate() to keep the serializer layer clean of SKU-lock business logic.

fields.description: Per-field validation errors keyed by field name (optional).
